title: Meme names — 12 invented character names
html:
Meme names — 12 invented character names

Source: 2023-12-28 Apple Note. Twelve invented or sampled names ("Lajarius, Ducleus, Elkton, Throat Surgeon, Darko, Donezzetti, Gandolf, Gandaki, Defeng, Benetar, Wyoming, Dragostine") + a phone number trailing the list. Same impulse as the July 2023 names list.

TL;DR

  • Twelve invented or remixed names — mostly fantasy/wrestling-flavored ("Throat Surgeon", "Lajarius", "Donezzetti", "Dragostine"). "Gandolf" + "Gandaki" appear as a near-pair (LOTR riff + Nepalese river).
  • "Defeng" is the only obviously Chinese-pronunciation name — possibly added during/after the 2024 China period given the long modify-window (note was edited up to May 2025).
  • Trailing 970-area phone number — Colorado area code, redacted below; probably contact captured separately and never moved.
  • Sits inside the same language-collection habit as 2023 10 23 cool saying, 2023 07 23 names, and the wrld brand suffix practice.
  • Note was modified across 17 months — rare for a meme list, suggesting he periodically opens it to add one more.

Privacy note

A US phone number appeared trailing the list. Redacted inline in this summary; raw note preserved in raw/.

Open questions

  • Is this a draft list for character names in a future game / project?
  • Whose number got captured here, and why in the meme-names note?

Related

  • 2023 10 23 cool saying
  • wrld brand suffix
  • nepal
